learn.title: Learn
learn.description: Conceptual overviews of Loopstack — what it is, how the workflow engine works, core abstractions (workflows, tools, documents), and the Studio UI.

build.title: Build
build.description: Step-by-step guides for building with Loopstack — getting started, workflow fundamentals, AI/LLM integration, workflow patterns, and third-party integrations.

extend.title: Extend
extend.description: How to add custom LLM providers and OAuth providers to the Loopstack registry.

reference.title: Reference
reference.description: API and configuration reference — module options, environment variables, YAML schemas for workflows and documents, and import paths.
